description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gcc Docker image with a single build stage. Add a build job that runs a before_script executing: uname -a; apt update; apt -y install gfortran-12; update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gfortran gfortran /usr/bin/gfortran-12 999; apt -y install make autoconf automake libtool pkg-config git python3-dev; apt -y install libboost-all-dev; git clone https://gitlab.com/mdds/mdds.git /mdds; pushd /mdds; ./autogen.sh; make install; popd; git clone https://gitlab.com/ixion/ixion.git /ixion; pushd /ixion; ./autogen.sh; make -j $(nproc); make install; popd; ldconfig. Then the script runs: ./autogen.sh --enable-debug-utils --with-doc-example; make -j $(nproc) check; make -j $(nproc) check-valgrind-memcheck. The job should run only for merge request events, tag pipelines, or commits on the default branch.
